Watchlist

Mock candidates with allocation intent and target entry zones.

NVDA

NVIDIA

High
tactical

Leadership quality remains elite if CPI and yields cooperate.

Entry: 958-972 | Suggested size: 4.5%

SMCI

Super Micro Computer

Medium
tactical

Only valid on confirmed reclaim because volatility quality remains poor.

Entry: 886-920 | Suggested size: 2.5%

TLT

iShares 20+ Year Treasury Bond ETF

Medium
hedge

Useful hedge if growth weakens faster than inflation re-accelerates.

Entry: Above 95.5 on yield rollover | Suggested size: 4%

TSLA

Tesla

Low
tactical

Needs trend repair before it can compete for capital with cleaner setups.

Entry: Reclaim 198 with RS improvement | Suggested size: 1.5%
